title: Integrity Recovery Cannot Be Established Before Execution
scenario: A clinical system previously degraded and claims recovery, but recovery cannot be established before execution.
state_transition: A recovery claim is made, but preservation recovery evidence is insufficient.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on the recovered state.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution after degradation requires reconstructable evidence that integrity has been restored.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because integrity recovery cannot be established.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when recovery from integrity degradation cannot be demonstrated.
clinical_action: Execute treatment under unverified recovered integrity
